description_long: This is a modern single-story bungalow with a flat roof and an open-plan layout. The structure features large windows and sliding glass doors, allowing for ample natural light throughout the living spaces. The backyard includes a wooden deck, a swimming pool with a curved shape, and a pergola-covered seating area on a patch of green lawn. The front of the bungalow is enclosed by a low wall, with a paved entryway leading to the main entrance. The exterior is finished in a combination of white and neutral tones, with some wooden accents visible on the deck and pergola. The overall design emphasizes clean lines, open spaces, and a strong connection between indoor and outdoor living areas.
description: A modern, single-story bungalow with a flat roof, large windows, a backyard pool, and a pergola-covered deck. The design features clean lines, open spaces, and a blend of white and wood finishes.
description_view_0: View 0 shows the front of the bungalow with the main entrance, paved entryway, and a glimpse of the open-plan interior.
description_view_1: View 1 highlights the side and rear, showcasing the backyard with the pool, pergola, and green lawn area.
description_view_2: View 2 provides a clear look at the backyard, emphasizing the swimming pool, wooden deck, and pergola structure.
description_view_3: View 3 displays the opposite side, revealing more of the interior layout and the connection between indoor and outdoor spaces.
attribute_window_arrangement: asymmetrical with large grouped windows and sliding glass doors
